name: You Better Belize It 2023

venue.name: [TCC Toledo Community College Auditorium](https://tcc.edu.bz/)
venue.address: TCC (Toledo Community College Auditorium - 454V+3CM, Punta Gorda, BZE

information:
**English**

This competition is recognized as an official World Cube Association competition. This is the first competition in Belize.
The competition is open to all competitors of all nationalities. Registration is available on the WCA website. No experience in WCA competitions is necessary, but competitors should be familiar with the WCA [Regulations](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)
The competition is free to spectators and guests.

**Spanish**

Esta competencia es reconocida como una competencia official de la World Cube Association. Esta es la primera competencia oficial en Belice.
La competencia es abierta a competidores de cualquier nacionalidad, El registro esta habilitado desde la página oficial de la WCA. No es necesario tener experiencia, pero los competidores deben estar conocer los [Reglamentos](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/regulations/)
El acceso a invitados y espectadores será gratuita.
